case_title: SANDEEP DHILLON VS. 2398 PACIFIC AVENUE LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-15-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-15-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SANDEEP DHILLON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 2398 PACIFIC AVENUE LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HASMIK NAZARI, PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT RANDOLPH KOPPL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DHILLON, SANDEEP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 2398 PACIFIC AVENUE LLC KOPPL, RUDOLPH G. $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $65.00) SERVED MAY-14-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KOPPL, RUDOLPH G.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $150.00) SERVED MAY-14-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT 2398 PACIFIC AVENUE LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT 2398 PACIFIC AVENUE LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,900.00 FILED BY DHILLON, SANDEEP AS TO DEFENDANT 2398 PACIFIC AVENUE LLC KOPPL, RUDOLPH G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
